full.label: Full (GPU, 16 GB+)
full.hardware: NVIDIA GPU, 16+ GB VRAM or split endpoints
full.summary: Vision model for screenshots plus a separate text model for a second opinion on extracted text.

vision_only.label: Vision (GPU, 12 GB+)
vision_only.summary: The vision model detects visual risks, reads on-screen text, and classifies text-risk signals in one pass.

text_only.label: Text only (no/low VRAM)
text_only.hardware: No GPU or under 12 GB VRAM; 8+ GB RAM recommended
text_only.summary: Tesseract OCR plus a small text model on CPU where possible. Visual-only risks may be missed.
